case_title: PHIL WALKER VS. BEACON RESID. COMM. ASSN.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO MAR-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PHIL WALKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL ALFARO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFEL. CLERK: G. FELICIANO. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKER, PHIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEACON RESID. COMM. ASSN. $30.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $85.00, INJUNCTIVE RELIEF DECLARING FEE SCHEDULE VOID IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
